Table of Contents

Enum esriRelationshipSplitPolicy

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Relationship split policy options.

[Guid("783D980E-05AA-11D4-A05A-00C04F6BDD84")]
public enum esriRelationshipSplitPolicy

Fields

esriRSPDeleteParts = 6

6: Delete the relationships and the part objects (with composite relationships).

esriRSPDeleteRelationship = 5

5: Delete the relationships.

esriRSPDuplicateRelatedObjects = 7

7: Duplicate the related objects in destination class.

esriRSPPreserveOnAll = 4

4: Preserve relationships on both resulting features (not valid with 1:1, 1:m).

esriRSPPreserveOnLargest = 2

2: Preserve relationships on the largest resulting feature.

esriRSPPreserveOnSmallest = 3

3: Preserve relationships on the smallest resulting feature.

esriRSPUseDefault = 1

1: Use the default policy.

Made with docfx
